_comment: NovaGuard OpenSearch Serverless — Emergency Protocol Vector Index Mapping
_description: This index stores vector embeddings of emergency protocol documents generated by Amazon Nova Multimodal Embeddings model (amazon.titan-embed-image-v2:0 / nova-embed-v1). Each document represents one emergency response protocol (ERP) with its embedding vector and metadata for hybrid search.

protocol_type._comment: MEDICAL | FIRE | POLICE | NATURAL_DISASTER | TRAFFIC | HAZMAT | WELFARE_CHECK

severity_min._comment: Minimum severity score this protocol applies to (0-100)

severity_max._comment: Maximum severity score this protocol applies to (0-100)

protocol_text._comment: Full text of the protocol document for BM25 lexical search

protocol_summary._comment: One-paragraph summary for display in dispatcher UI

caller_instructions._comment: Step-by-step instructions to relay to the caller over voice/text

embedding._comment: 1024-dim dense vector from Nova Multimodal Embeddings model. Used for semantic similarity search.

image_embedding._comment: 1024-dim image embedding from Nova Multimodal Embeddings. Populated only for protocols with visual triage guides.

has_image_embedding._comment: True if image_embedding field is populated

applicable_regions._comment: List of ISO 3166-2 region codes where this protocol applies. Empty = global.

hazards._comment: Specific hazards this protocol addresses (e.g., carbon_monoxide, cardiac_arrest)

accessibility_notes._comment: Special instructions for serving callers with disabilities

languages._comment: Language codes (BCP-47) for which caller_instructions are available

source_document_s3_key._comment: S3 key of the original PDF/DOCX source document in novaguard-protocol-docs bucket

authority._comment: Issuing authority: NFPA | ACEP | IACP | FEMA | LOCAL | CUSTOM
